title: noccaea aucheri
intro: Noccaea aucheri, also known as Aucher's penny cress, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Noccaea aucheri include its potential to alleviate coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. Noccaea aucheri is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
